# seerr_job_schedule (Resource)

Manage a background job schedule in Seerr via `/api/v1/settings/jobs/{job_id}/schedule`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job_id` (String) The ID of the background job (e.g., `plex-sync`, `radarr-sync`).
- `schedule` (String) The cron expression for the job schedule.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# In Terraform 1.5.0 and later, use an import block to import seerr_job_schedule. For example:
#
# import {
#   to = seerr_job_schedule.example
#   id = "plex-sync"
# }

# The ID of the job, for example: `plex-sync`, `radarr-sync`, etc.
# Otherwise, use the terraform import command:
terraform import seerr_job_schedule.example plex-sync
```
